name: barrioya-frontend-runner
description: Static file server adapter for BarrioYa. Serves /app (HTML/CSS/JS) on port 3000 for the Emergent preview environment. Config is at /app/serve.json (cleanUrls:false, no SPA fallback — admin/* and *.html files served as-is). The main app uses hash routing so doesn't need server-side rewrites.
